nodes.name: 瓦哈卡州
nodes.summary: 瓦哈卡州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括灰胸穴䳍、角冠雉、Long-tailed wood partridge等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Greater pewee
nodes.summary: Greater pewee（Greater pewee，学名 Contopus pertinax），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于瓦哈卡州。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: minor is found from east of the Isthmus of Tehuantepec intermittently through Guatemala, Belize, El Salvador, and Honduras into far north-central Nicaragua. The nominate subspecies occurs as a vagrant in California and migrates in small numbers through western Texas. The greater pewee primarily inhabits pine and pine-oak forest in the subtropical and temperate zones. In migration and to some extent during the non-breeding season it also occurs in deciduous riparian forest within pine and pine-oak forest but not within more open areas.
